meta.name: Type B — The Sky Penthouse
meta.tagline: Upper-floor residences with private terrace gardens.
meta.description: Upper-floor penthouses with private rooftop terrace gardens, double-height living, and uninterrupted views in three directions. Best for the connoisseur who wants altitude, privacy and outdoor entertaining.
meta.useWhen: Pitch when a client wants the highest possible vantage, terrace-led entertaining, and a residence that doubles as a vertical retreat. Often paired with private elevator lobby and concierge service.

slides.title: The Sky Penthouse
slides.subtitle: Altitude, privacy and a sky one can step into.
slides.body: Reserved for the uppermost floors of the crowning tower, the Sky Penthouse rises above the surrounding green canopy — a residence where the boundary between interior and horizon is studied with care.

slides.title: A garden in the sky.
slides.body: A private terrace garden wraps around the living wing — a landscape conceived for both intimate dinners and large gatherings, with shade structures, water features and integrated planters.

slides.title: Configuration & Areas
slides.subtitle: Indicative — to be confirmed with the sales team.

slides.title: Double-height. Single horizon.
slides.body: The living space opens upward across two storeys, framed by a 9-metre window wall. A floating mezzanine reads as a quiet library above — a calm counterpoint to the open volume below.

slides.title: A suite with three windows of light.
slides.body: The master suite spans the corner — dressing room, ensuite spa, study and a private balcony each oriented differently. Mornings, afternoons and evenings are each given their own room.
